title: The New-Issue Window Flies Open: Inside 2026's Red-Hot First-Half IPO Rush
summary: 2026's first half has seen a surge in IPO activity with the new-issue window wide open. Key names like Anthropic and OpenAI are among those in focus.

title: Zoom: Anthropic Stake Masks Seat-Based Fears (Rating Downgrade)
summary: Zoom has been downgraded to Hold as analysts warn its Anthropic stake may be hiding concerns over declining seat-based growth. Valuation risks remain elevated.

title: Commodities: Oil Slides Despite Stalled U.S.-Iran Talks
summary: Oil prices fell even as U.S.-Iran nuclear negotiations remain deadlocked, signaling bearish supply sentiment. Gold and agricultural commodities also saw notable moves.

title: Chevron: Well Positioned Amid Middle East Uncertainty
summary: Chevron is seen as well-positioned to navigate ongoing Middle East geopolitical risks given its diversified asset base. Analysts view the stock favorably at current levels.

title: A Top For The Gasoline Price
summary: Technical analysis suggests gasoline prices may have reached a short-term peak, with implications for energy ETFs and oil-linked equities. A pullback could ease inflation pressures.

title: THOR Industries Q3 Review: Bad Times Are Rolling In
summary: THOR Industries posted a weak Q3 as RV demand continues to soften amid economic headwinds. Analysts warn further deterioration may be ahead for the recreational vehicle sector.
